ATL.headline: Checkmates and closeouts: Inside the NBA's quiet chess boom
ATL.description: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

ATL.headline: Atlanta visits Miami for conference showdown
ATL.description: Atlanta Hawks (46-35, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (42-39, 10th in the Eastern Conference)

ATL.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
ATL.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

ATL.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights
ATL.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights

ATL.headline: Hawks clinch a playoff spot and Southeast Division behind 29 points from McCollum in rout of Cavs
ATL.description: — CJ McCollum scored 29 points and the Atlanta Hawks used a big third quarter to blow out the Cleveland Cavaliers 124-102 on Friday night, clinching a playoff spot and the Southeast Division title.

MIA.headline: Checkmates and closeouts: Inside the NBA's quiet chess boom
MIA.description: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

MIA.headline: Atlanta visits Miami for conference showdown
MIA.description: Atlanta Hawks (46-35, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (42-39, 10th in the Eastern Conference)

MIA.headline: Wizards clinch NBA's worst record with 140-117 loss to Heat
MIA.description: — The Washington Wizards clinched the worst record in the NBA on Friday night with a 140-117 loss to the Miami Heat.

MIA.headline: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights
MIA.description: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

MIA.headline: Heat waive Rozier, use roster spot to sign Jahmir Young
MIA.description: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling investigation, has been waived by the Heat.
